html:
The Salt Lick is a Structure found in the Tools Tab. It requires 2 Boards and 4 Nitre to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.


When certain animals are within 4 tiles of Salt Lick, these animals will each lick every 60 second until it is depleted. Each Beefalo consumes 2 uses per lick and their domestication level loss is paused. Each Koalefant consumes 4 uses per lick. Each Volt Goat consumes 1 use per lick.

Salt Lick attracts the above animals within 20 tiles. This can be used to bait the above animals when making a pen.

Tips

  • Volt Goats and Koalefants cannot be domesticated nor will they gain domestication. Keeping them around a Salt Lick would only waste the uses of this structure with no benefits.
  • The Beefalo can be "parked" close to a Salt Lick as they will stay in close proximity to it.

Trivia

  • The Salt Lick was first introduced to Don't Starve Together. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • Salt Licks are considered to be part of A New Reign, even though they were introduced before the official start of the beta branch.
  • Salt licks are real-life tools used particularly in zoos to give the ungulates all the minerals they normally obtain from mineral swamps.
  • Wilson's quote is a reference to the classic Tootsie Pop slogan, "How many licks does it take to get to the center of a Tootsie Pop?"
  • Contrary to its name, the Salt Lick is made with Nitre, not Salt Crystals. This may be to ensure that the Salt Lick is available for players to use before they have access to Salt Crystals, or because Salt Crystals were added to the game after the Salt Lick.

Gallery

  • The stages of a Salt Lick.
  • A burnt Salt Lick.
  • Maxwell next to a destroyed Salt Lick.

“How many licks does it take to get to the center?”
–Wilson
“It's a big block of slobbery salt.”
–Willow
“Heh heh. Hair cow has funny tongue!”
–Wolfgang
“The beasts crave it...”
–Wendy
“FLESHLINGS RUB THEIR FILTHY TONGUE-STUMPS ON IT”
–WX-78
“A cube of sodium chloride to lure wild beasts.”
–Wickerbottom
“My mouth's dry just looking at it.”
–Woodie
“So salty.”
–Maxwell
“A cube of sodium to placate my domesticated bovine.”
–Wagstaff
“Minerals, nöt meat.”
–Wigfrid
“We really regret licking it. Blech.”
–Webber
“Salt makes everything taste better. Even salt.”
–Walani
“Too salty.”
–Warly
“Saltier than ol' Woodlegs.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS BIG BLOCK O' SALT”
–Wilba
“Lick rock. For Shaggy Buddy”
–Wormwood
“Swell. It's a big lump of salt.”
–Wheeler
“Keeps livestock nice and docile.”
–Winona
“I've been told I don't make a lick of sense.”
–Wortox
“What you mean, "only for beefalo"?”
–Wurt
“Don't eat that Woby, it's for the beefalo!”
–Walter
“Imagine getting so distracted by a chunk of salt.”
–Wanda
The Salt Lick is a Structure found in the Tools Tab. It requires 2 Boards and 4 Nitre to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
When certain animals are within 4 tiles of Salt Lick, these animals will each lick every 60 second until it is depleted. Each Beefalo consumes 2 uses per lick and their domestication level loss is paused. Each Koalefant consumes 4 uses per lick. Each Volt Goat consumes 1 use per lick.
Salt Lick attracts the above animals within 20 tiles. This can be used to bait the above animals when making a pen.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Volt Goats and Koalefants cannot be domesticated nor will they gain domestication. Keeping them around a Salt Lick would only waste the uses of this structure with no benefits.
The Beefalo can be "parked" close to a Salt Lick as they will stay in close proximity to it.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Salt Lick was first introduced to Don't Starve Together. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
Salt Licks are considered to be part of A New Reign, even though they were introduced before the official start of the beta branch.
Salt licks are real-life tools used particularly in zoos to give the ungulates all the minerals they normally obtain from mineral swamps.
Wilson's quote is a reference to the classic Tootsie Pop slogan, "How many licks does it take to get to the center of a Tootsie Pop?"
Contrary to its name, the Salt Lick is made with Nitre, not Salt Crystals. This may be to ensure that the Salt Lick is available for players to use before they have access to Salt Crystals, or because Salt Crystals were added to the game after the Salt Lick.

The '''Salt Lick''' is a [[Structure]] found in the [[Tools Tab]]. It requires 2 [[Board]]s and 4 [[Nitre]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. 

__NOTOC__

When certain animals are within 4 tiles of Salt Lick, these animals will each lick every 60 second until it is depleted. Each [[Beefalo]] consumes 2 uses per lick and their domestication level loss is paused. Each [[Koalefant]] consumes 4 uses per lick. Each [[Volt Goat]] consumes 1 use per lick. 

Salt Lick attracts the above animals within 20 tiles. This can be used to bait the above animals when making a pen.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Volt Goats and Koalefants cannot be domesticated nor will they gain domestication. Keeping them around a Salt Lick would only waste the uses of this structure with no benefits.
* The Beefalo can be "parked" close to a Salt Lick as they will stay in close proximity to it.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Salt Lick was first introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It was later added to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update.
* Salt Licks are considered to be part of ''[[A New Reign]]'', even though they were introduced before the official start of the beta branch.
* [[wikipedia:Mineral_lick|Salt licks]] are real-life tools used particularly in zoos to give the ungulates all the minerals they normally obtain from mineral swamps.
*Wilson's quote  is a reference to the classic Tootsie Pop slogan, "How many licks does it take to get to the center of a Tootsie Pop?"
*Contrary to its name, the Salt Lick is made with Nitre, not [[Salt Crystals]]. This may be to ensure that the Salt Lick is available for players to use before they have access to Salt Crystals, or because Salt Crystals were added to the game after the Salt Lick.
